sql_history.sql:
SELECT 
    s.VENDOR_NAME,
    SUM(aia.INVOICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_SPENT,
    ail.DESCRIPTION,
    SUM(ail.QUANTITY_INVOICED) AS TOTAL_QUANTITY_INVOICED
FROM 
    AP_INVOICES_ALL aia
JOIN 
    AP_SUPPLIERS s ON aia.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID
JOIN 
    AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL ail ON aia.INVOICE_ID = ail.INVOICE_ID
GROUP BY 
    s.VENDOR_NAME, ail.DESCRIPTION
ORDER BY 
    TOTAL_SPENT DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT 
    s.VENDOR_NAME,
    SUM(aia.INVOICE_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_SPENT,
    ail.DESCRIPTION,
    SUM(ail.QUANTITY_INVOICED) AS QUANTITY_PURCHASED
FROM 
    AP_INVOICES_ALL aia
JOIN 
    AP_SUPPLIERS s ON aia.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID
JOIN 
    AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL ail ON aia.INVOICE_ID = ail.INVOICE_ID
GROUP BY 
    s.VENDOR_NAME, ail.DESCRIPTION
ORDER BY 
    TOTAL_SPENT DESC, QUANTITY_PURCHASED DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;

SELECT 
    s.VENDOR_NAME,
    i.INVOICE_NUM,
    i.INVOICE_DATE,
    i.INVOICE_AMOUNT
FROM 
    AP_INVOICES_ALL i
JOIN 
    AP_SUPPLIERS s ON i.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID
WHERE 
    s.VENDOR_NAME = 'Customer Name' -- Replace 'Customer Name' with the actual vendor name you want to filter by
ORDER BY 
    i.INVOICE_AMOUNT DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;
